home.title: Home
home.description: Create permissionless on-chain bounty & reward contests. Anyone can launch a contest with any number of prize positions, fund them in GMB or any ERC-20, name winners, and let them claim trustlessly. Built on GembaBlockchain Testnet by GEMBA IT.

wallet.installPrompt: No injected wallet found. Install MetaMask or use WalletConnect.

home.title: On-chain bounties & reward contests
home.subtitle: Launch a contest, fund any number of prize positions in GMB or an ERC-20, name your winners — they claim trustlessly. Permissionless on GembaBlockchain testnet.
home.getStarted: Connect your wallet to create or claim

permissionless.title: Permissionless
permissionless.body: Anyone can launch a contest by paying a small factory fee — you become its sole owner. No approvals, no gatekeepers.

positions.title: Any number of prizes
positions.body: Define 1 to 50 prize positions, each with its own amount and winner. Not limited to fixed categories.

trustless.title: Trustless payout
trustless.body: Funds live in the contest contract. Winners claim directly; unclaimed prizes return to the owner after the window. No middleman.

create.title: Create a contest
create.subtitle: Configure your bounty. You will be its owner — fund the positions and name winners afterwards.
create.name: Contest name
create.feeNote: Paid once to the factory to deploy your contest contract. Prize funds are deposited separately, in the next step.
create.connectFirst: Connect your wallet to create a contest.
create.wrongNetwork: Switch your wallet to {{name}} to continue.
create.ownerNote: You become the owner of this contest and fund it next.

errors.name: Enter a contest name.
errors.deadline: Deadline must be between 1 and 365 days.
errors.token: Enter a valid ERC-20 token address.

contests.title: Contests
contests.empty: No contests yet. Be the first to create one.
contests.emptyMine: You have not created or won any contest yet.
contests.fundHint: Enter the amount for each position in {{sym}}. This deposits all positions at once.
contests.amountsInvalid: Every position needs an amount greater than 0.
contests.connectToAct: Connect your wallet to fund, set winners or claim.

settings.title: Factory settings
settings.subtitle: Owner-only controls for the GembaWin factory.
settings.setFeeHint: The fee (in GMB) charged to create a new contest.
settings.withdrawHint: Send the accumulated create fees to an address (defaults to you).
settings.pauseHint: While paused, no new contests can be created. Existing contests are unaffected.
settings.feeHint: The fiat fee charged via GembaPay to create a contract. Owner only.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions about GembaWin, launching a contest or an integration? Send a message — it reaches the GEMBA IT team.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.ok: Thank you — your message was sent. We’ll reply soon.
contact.err: Something went wrong. Please complete the check and try again.

faucet.title: Faucet
faucet.subtitle: Get free testnet GMB and stablecoins (USDT/USDC/EURC) to try GembaBlockchain and its dApps. One claim per asset every 24 hours.
faucet.note: Per wallet: 0.1 GMB and 10,000 of each stablecoin per 24h. These are valueless testnet assets.
faucet.addToWallet: Add these addresses to MetaMask to see your test stablecoin balances.

pay.awaitingHint: Complete the payment in the GembaPay tab. This page updates automatically.
